title: bromus mollis var. secalinus
intro: Bromus mollis var. secalinus, also known as soft brome or meadow brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the bromus plant family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bromus mollis var. secalinus include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and grinding the leaves to make tea or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
